text.title: Feature Flag Core Implementation Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: os.getenv('FF_X') littered across 12 files; flip an override → 4 places still read stale value.
antipattern.fix: Centralise via FeatureFlagManager.is_enabled; lint direct ENV reads of FF_*.

antipattern.symptom: Typo in is_enabled('new_chekout') silently returns False; feature never activates.
antipattern.fix: Register flags via FeatureFlag dataclasses; reject is_enabled with unregistered name in CI.

antipattern.symptom: Missing flag returns True; new endpoint behaviour activates for everyone.
antipattern.fix: Default to False for unknown flags; pin a regression test.
